BackstoryDef.title: Adventure child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fell off a cliff but was fortunate to survive. Even more unexpectedly, [PAWN_nameDef] obtained the complete inheritance of a martial arts grandmaster.

BackstoryDef.title: Abandoned child by the sea
BackstoryDef.description: As an infant, [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned by [PAWN_possessive] parents by the seaside but miraculously survived. Although [PAWN_pronoun] had lived alone in the wild for as long as [PAWN_pronoun] could remember, [PAWN_pronoun] vaguely recalled a woman appearing from the sea to help [PAWN_pronoun] whenever danger arose.

BackstoryDef.title: Spirit-communing child
BackstoryDef.description: From a young age, [PAWN_nameDef] could hear whispers from the depths of the ocean. As [PAWN_pronoun] grew older, the voices became clearer, and [PAWN_pronoun] learned to receive guidance from them.

BackstoryDef.title: Mute child
BackstoryDef.description: When [PAWN_nameDef] was born, [PAWN_pronoun] fell gravely ill. Although the doctor barely managed to save [PAWN_pronoun]'s life, the medication took away [PAWN_possessive] voice.

BackstoryDef.title: Reincarnation of the Jade Immortal
BackstoryDef.description: A sudden disaster swept across the planet, leaving countless lives in ruin. [PAWN_nameDef] made the decision to split a portion of [PAWN_nameDef]'s primordial spirit to descend once more, using [PAWN_pronoun]'s mortal body to save the suffering people. However, once [PAWN_nameDef]'s primordial spirit descended, [PAWN_pronoun] would lose all divine power and would have to start from scratch in cultivation.

BackstoryDef.title: Beast transformation
BackstoryDef.description: After a century of cultivation, [PAWN_nameDef] gained consciousness in the body of a demon beast and transformed into a human form, though [PAWN_possessive] body still differed from that of ordinary humans.

BackstoryDef.title: Red boy
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a very short-tempered child, living on a planet where technology was still stuck in the feudal era. Due to [PAWN_possessive] father's name being the same as a famous monk's Dharma name, [PAWN_pronoun] was often asked if [PAWN_pronoun] was the monk's illegitimate child. Whenever this happened, [PAWN_pronoun]'s face would turn bright red with anger.

BackstoryDef.title: The dreaming child
BackstoryDef.description: While guarding the immortal peach orchard, [PAWN_nameDef] accidentally allowed a monkey to eat all the immortal peaches. As a result, [PAWN_pronoun]'s master expelled [PAWN_nameDef] from the sect, leaving [PAWN_pronoun] to fend for [PAWN_pronoun]'s self.

BackstoryDef.title: Traverser
BackstoryDef.description: An accident should have ended [PAWN_nameDef]'s life, but when [PAWN_pronoun] woke up, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_pronoun]'s self in an unfamiliar place, with [PAWN_pronoun]'s hands now looking youthful.

BackstoryDef.title: Child occupy by a soul
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once an innocent child, living in a small village. One night, an injured rogue cultivator broke into the village and infused [PAWN_possessive] soul into [PAWN_nameDef]'s body. From that moment on, [PAWN_nameDef] became violent, exhibiting abilities that ordinary people could not comprehend.

BackstoryDef.title: Rising star of the sect
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] possesses exceptional talent and an outstanding character. During a sect competition, [PAWN_pronoun] outshone all others and earned the appreciation of the elders. Under the guidance of renowned mentors and through [PAWN_possessive] own diligent efforts, [PAWN_pronoun] grew rapidly, becoming a prominent rising star within the sect. Despite [PAWN_possessive] achievements, [PAWN_nameDef] remained humble and continued to work tirelessly.

BackstoryDef.title: Rich disciple
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] may have average talent, but [PAWN_possessive] privileged background ensures [PAWN_pronoun] thrives within the sect. [PAWN_pronoun] is never short of glittering spirit stones in [PAWN_possessive] pockets, nor lacking in attendants among the sect's laborers. For [PAWN_nameDef], sect life is merely a way to add a touch of prestige to [PAWN_possessive] name.

BackstoryDef.title: Rude and dominant disciple
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s personality is impulsive and aggressive, often bullying the surrounding disciples because of [PAWN_pronoun] strength. [PAWN_nameDef] always has boundless energy and is extremely active. [PAWN_nameDef] has a natural advantage in cultivating body techniques, but [PAWN_pronoun]’s personality causes a significant number of people to dislike [PAWN_pronoun].

BackstoryDef.title: Honest sect disciple
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has an honest personality and some talent, but opportunities to showcase [PAWN_pronoun] abilities have always been scarce. Watching the smooth-talking disciples win the favor of the elders, [PAWN_nameDef] can only stand aside and observe from a far.

BackstoryDef.title: Mediocre disciple
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born with a natural spiritual bud, leading [PAWN_pronoun] family to recommend [PAWN_pronoun] to a local sect at an early age. However, encountering countless prodigies in cultivation made [PAWN_nameDef] keenly aware of the gap in innate talent. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] began to shirk responsibilities and neglect cultivation, mastering the art of idling and avoiding effort.
